name: Pokémon – Rebirth (Alola Adventure)
description:
(Ai story doesn't propoganding actions. It's just ai story idea, don't take it seriously)

Welcome to Alola region! There a place where you will don't worry about your problems from university and your work. Your problems are resolved already! Congratulations!

All what you need to do, it's just accept your destiny and be happy in you new life with pokemons! There so many events you will encounter! 😀
